---
title: "KOALA Nowcast"
subtitle: "Koalitionswahrscheinlichkeiten Landtagswahlen 2026"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/adibender/koala
---

```{r}
#| output: false
library(jsonlite)

load_election <- function(dir) {
  tryCatch(
    list(
      coalitions    = fromJSON(file.path(dir, "coalition_probabilities.json"), simplifyVector = FALSE),
      party_data    = fromJSON(file.path(dir, "party_shares.json"),            simplifyVector = FALSE),
      hurdle_data   = fromJSON(file.path(dir, "hurdle_probabilities.json"),    simplifyVector = FALSE),
      pollster_data = fromJSON(file.path(dir, "per_pollster.json"),            simplifyVector = FALSE)
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

ojs_define(
  all_data = list(
    ST = load_election("data/st"),
    MV = load_election("data/mv"),
    BE = load_election("data/be")
  ),
  election_meta = list(
    ST = list(title = "Sachsen-Anhalt Landtagswahl 2026",         seats = 83L,  majority = 42L),
    MV = list(title = "Mecklenburg-Vorpommern Landtagswahl 2026", seats = 71L,  majority = 36L),
    BE = list(title = "Abgeordnetenhauswahl Berlin 2026",          seats = 130L, majority = 66L)
  ),
  party_colors = list(
    cdu = "#1c1c1b", spd = "#e3000f", afd = "#82caff",
    greens = "#46962b", fdp = "#ffed00", fw = "#005fa3",
    left = "#be3075", bsw = "#6d1f99", others = "#aaaaaa"
  ),
  party_names = list(
    cdu = "Union", spd = "SPD", afd = "AfD",
    greens = "Grüne", fdp = "FDP", fw = "Freie Wähler",
    left = "Linke", bsw = "BSW", others = "Sonstige"
  )
)
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
d3 = require("d3@7")
party_order = ["left", "spd", "bsw", "greens", "fdp", "fw", "cdu", "afd"]
```

# {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
viewof election = Inputs.radio(
  new Map([
    ["Sachsen-Anhalt",          "ST"],
    ["Mecklenburg-Vorpommern",  "MV"],
    ["Berlin",                  "BE"]
  ]),
  { value: "ST", label: "Bundesland" }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
cur      = all_data[election]
cur_meta = election_meta[election]
updated  = new Date(cur.coalitions.updated).toLocaleDateString("de-DE", {
  day: "2-digit", month: "long", year: "numeric", hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit"
})
```

```{ojs}
html`<hr style="margin:12px 0">`
```

```{ojs}
pollsters = {
  const names = Array.from(
    new Set(cur.pollster_data.per_pollster.map(d => d.pollster))
  ).sort()
  return ["Pooled", ...names]
}

viewof institute = Inputs.select(pollsters, { value: "Pooled", label: "Institut" })
```

```{ojs}
html`<hr style="margin:12px 0">
<div style="font-size:0.8em;color:#666;line-height:1.6">
  <b>${cur_meta.title}</b><br>
  ${cur_meta.seats} Sitze &nbsp;·&nbsp; Mehrheit ≥ ${cur_meta.majority}<br>
  Aktualisiert: ${updated}
</div>`
```

# Überblick

## Row

```{ojs}
{
  // --- Party shares: works for both pooled and single institute ---
  const rawShares = institute === "Pooled"
    ? cur.party_data.party_shares
    : cur.pollster_data.per_pollster.filter(d => d.pollster === institute)

  const shares = rawShares
    .filter(d => d.party !== "others")
    .sort((a, b) => party_order.indexOf(a.party) - party_order.indexOf(b.party))

  const maxX = 45
  const shareStack = shares.flatMap(d => [
    { name: party_names[d.party] || d.party, party: d.party,
      x1: 0, x2: d.percent, fill: party_colors[d.party] || "#aaa" },
    { name: party_names[d.party] || d.party, party: d.party,
      x1: d.percent, x2: maxX, fill: "#f2f2f2" }
  ])
  const shareDomain = shares.map(d => party_names[d.party] || d.party)

  const sharesPlot = Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 80, marginRight: 50, height: 260,
    x: { label: "Stimmenanteil (%)", domain: [0, maxX] },
    y: { domain: shareDomain, label: null },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(shareStack, { y: "name", x1: "x1", x2: "x2", fill: "fill" }),
      Plot.ruleX([5], { stroke: "#c0392b", strokeDasharray: "4 3", strokeWidth: 1.5 }),
      Plot.text(shares.filter(d => d.percent >= 8), {
        y: d => party_names[d.party] || d.party, x: d => d.percent / 2,
        text: d => d.percent.toFixed(1) + "%",
        fill: d => d.party === "fdp" ? "#555" : "white",
        fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 12, textAnchor: "middle"
      }),
      Plot.text(shares.filter(d => d.percent < 8), {
        y: d => party_names[d.party] || d.party, x: d => d.percent + 0.8,
        text: d => d.percent.toFixed(1) + "%",
        fill: "#555", fontSize: 12, textAnchor: "start"
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  })

  // Single-institute view: just the party shares chart
  if (institute !== "Gepooled") {
    return html`<div style="padding:4px 0">
      <div style="font-size:0.9em;font-weight:600;color:#333;margin-bottom:8px">
        Umfragewerte — ${institute}
      </div>
      ${sharesPlot}
    </div>`
  }

  // --- Coalition chart (pooled only) ---
  const coal = cur.coalitions.coalitions
    .filter(d => d.probability > 0.001)
    .sort((a, b) => b.probability - a.probability)
  const coalStack = coal.flatMap(d => [
    { label: d.label, x1: 0, x2: d.probability,
      fill: d.probability >= 0.9 ? "#2e7d32" : d.probability >= 0.5 ? "#e65100" : "#c62828" },
    { label: d.label, x1: d.probability, x2: 1.0, fill: "#e8e8e8" }
  ])
  const coalDomain = coal.map(d => d.label)
  const coalPlot = Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 220, marginRight: 10,
    height: Math.max(200, coal.length * 46 + 40),
    caption: `Mehrheit ≥ ${cur_meta.majority} Sitze`,
    x: { label: null, domain: [0, 1], tickFormat: d => (d * 100).toFixed(0) + "%", axis: "top" },
    y: { domain: coalDomain, label: null },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(coalStack, { y: "label", x1: "x1", x2: "x2", fill: "fill" }),
      Plot.text(coal.filter(d => d.probability >= 0.12), {
        y: "label", x: d => d.probability / 2,
        text: d => (d.probability * 100).toFixed(1) + "%",
        fill: "white", fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 13, textAnchor: "middle"
      }),
      Plot.text(coal.filter(d => d.probability < 0.12), {
        y: "label", x: d => d.probability + 0.015,
        text: d => (d.probability * 100).toFixed(1) + "%",
        fill: "#444", fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 12, textAnchor: "start"
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0.5], { stroke: "#555", strokeDasharray: "4 3", strokeWidth: 1.5 }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  })

  // --- Hurdle chart (pooled only) ---
  const hurdles = cur.hurdle_data.hurdle
    .filter(d => d.party !== "others")
    .sort((a, b) => b.prob_above_hurdle - a.prob_above_hurdle)
  const hurdleDomain = hurdles.map(d => party_names[d.party] || d.party)
  const hurdleStack = hurdles.flatMap(d => [
    { name: party_names[d.party] || d.party, party: d.party,
      x1: 0, x2: d.prob_above_hurdle,
      fill: d.prob_above_hurdle >= 0.9 ? (party_colors[d.party] || "#aaa") : "#bdbdbd" },
    { name: party_names[d.party] || d.party, party: d.party,
      x1: d.prob_above_hurdle, x2: 1.0, fill: "#f2f2f2" }
  ])
  const hurdlePlot = Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 80, marginRight: 10, height: 260,
    x: { label: "Einzugswahrscheinlichkeit", domain: [0, 1],
         tickFormat: d => (d * 100).toFixed(0) + "%" },
    y: { domain: hurdleDomain, label: null },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(hurdleStack, { y: "name", x1: "x1", x2: "x2", fill: "fill" }),
      Plot.ruleX([0.5], { stroke: "#e65100", strokeDasharray: "4 3", strokeWidth: 1.5 }),
      Plot.text(hurdles.filter(d => d.prob_above_hurdle >= 0.2), {
        y: d => party_names[d.party] || d.party, x: d => d.prob_above_hurdle / 2,
        text: d => (d.prob_above_hurdle * 100).toFixed(1) + "%",
        fill: d => d.party === "fdp" ? "#555" : "white",
        fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 12, textAnchor: "middle"
      }),
      Plot.text(hurdles.filter(d => d.prob_above_hurdle < 0.2), {
        y: d => party_names[d.party] || d.party, x: d => d.prob_above_hurdle + 0.015,
        text: d => (d.prob_above_hurdle * 100).toFixed(1) + "%",
        fill: "#555", fontSize: 12, textAnchor: "start"
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  })

  // Pooled view: all three charts
  return html`<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:0.9em;font-weight:600;color:#333;margin-bottom:4px">Koalitionswahrscheinlichkeiten</div>
      ${coalPlot}
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:20px">
      <div style="flex:1">
        <div style="font-size:0.9em;font-weight:600;color:#333;margin-bottom:4px">Umfragewerte (Pooled)</div>
        ${sharesPlot}
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1">
        <div style="font-size:0.9em;font-weight:600;color:#333;margin-bottom:4px">Wahrscheinlichkeit des Einzugs (5%-Hürde)</div>
        ${hurdlePlot}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`
}
```

# Methodik

## Row

```{ojs}
html`
<div style="max-width:700px;line-height:1.7;font-size:0.95em">
<h3>Methodik</h3>
<p>Die Koalitionswahrscheinlichkeiten werden mit dem R-Paket
<a href="https://github.com/adibender/coalitions" target="_blank"><code>coalitions</code></a>
berechnet (Bender &amp; Bauer, 2018).</p>
<h4>Datenbasis</h4>
<p>Umfragedaten der letzten 14 Tage von <a href="https://www.wahlrecht.de" target="_blank">wahlrecht.de</a>
werden gepooled.</p>
<h4>Berechnung</h4>
<ol>
  <li><b>Pooling:</b> Mehrere Umfragen werden gewichtet gemittelt.</li>
  <li><b>Monte-Carlo-Simulation:</b> 10.000 Wahlausgänge werden aus der Dirichlet-Posterior-Verteilung gezogen.</li>
  <li><b>Sitzverteilung:</b> Für jeden simulierten Ausgang wird die Sitzverteilung nach dem Hare-Niemeyer-Verfahren berechnet
  (${cur_meta.seats} Sitze, 5%-Hürde).</li>
  <li><b>Koalitionswahrscheinlichkeit:</b> Anteil der Simulationen, in denen eine Koalition ≥ ${cur_meta.majority} Sitze erreicht.</li>
</ol>
<p><b>Hinweis:</b> Die Berechnung basiert auf Umfragedaten und spiegelt den Informationsstand zum Zeitpunkt der letzten
Aktualisierung wider. Wahlüberraschungen, strategisches Wählen und Mobilisierungseffekte am Wahltag sind nicht modelliert.</p>
</div>
`
```
